description: Anna Executa plugin for Presenton template discovery, manifest-based deck HTML generation, deck HTML to PPTX model conversion, and stability validation.
author: Anna Developer

tools.name: app_list_workspaces
tools.description: Scan the default PPT task workspace root and return existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspaces.

tools.name: app_get_workspace_defaults
tools.description: Read global PPT workspace defaults used by newly created workspaces without creating a workspace.

tools.name: app_create_workspace
tools.description: Create a new PPT task workspace under the default workspace root and initialize core JSON files.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Optional project title. Defaults to the generated workspace id.

tools.name: app_open_workspace
tools.description: Open an existing PPT task workspace and initialize any missing core JSON files.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_commit_uploaded_source_host_upload
tools.description: Commit one Host Upload object into a Workspace as Workspace-owned Uploaded Source Material.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: Original display filename selected by the user.

parameters.name: mime_type
parameters.description: Browser-provided or inferred MIME type.

parameters.name: size_bytes
parameters.description: Expected uploaded file size in bytes.

parameters.name: host_upload
parameters.description: HostUploadRef returned by the Anna App Host Upload API.

tools.name: app_list_style_profiles
tools.description: List published global Style Profiles available to PPT workspaces.

tools.name: app_get_style_profile_preview
tools.description: Read one published Style Profile's metadata and first reference image as a Host Upload reference.

parameters.name: style_profile_id
parameters.description: Published Style Profile id from app_list_style_profiles.

tools.name: app_get_style_profile
tools.description: Read one published Style Profile's metadata, Markdown content, and selected reference images as Host Upload references.

parameters.name: style_profile_id
parameters.description: Published Style Profile id from app_list_style_profiles.

tools.name: app_prepare_style_profile_creation
tools.description: Create a Style Profile Creation Workspace for uploaded PPTX/image references and draft/profile.md.

parameters.name: display_name
parameters.description: Optional display name for the Style Profile being created.

tools.name: app_commit_style_profile_reference_host_upload
tools.description: Commit one Host Upload object into a Style Profile Creation Workspace as a reference file.

parameters.name: creation_id
parameters.description: Style Profile Creation Workspace id returned by app_prepare_style_profile_creation.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: Original display filename selected by the user.

parameters.name: mime_type
parameters.description: Browser-provided or inferred MIME type.

parameters.name: size_bytes
parameters.description: Expected reference file size in bytes.

parameters.name: host_upload
parameters.description: HostUploadRef returned by the Anna App Host Upload API.

tools.name: app_get_style_profile_creation_context
tools.description: Read Style Profile Creation Workspace paths, manifest, and up to five selected Reference Slide Images for Agent analysis.

parameters.name: creation_id
parameters.description: Style Profile Creation Workspace id.

tools.name: app_get_style_profile_draft_fingerprint
tools.description: Read existence and file fingerprint metadata for draft/profile.md in a Style Profile Creation Workspace.

parameters.name: creation_id
parameters.description: Style Profile Creation Workspace id.

tools.name: app_get_style_profile_draft
tools.description: Read draft/profile.md from a Style Profile Creation Workspace.

parameters.name: creation_id
parameters.description: Style Profile Creation Workspace id.

tools.name: app_publish_style_profile
tools.description: Publish a valid draft/profile.md into the global Style Profile Library and update the library index.

parameters.name: creation_id
parameters.description: Style Profile Creation Workspace id.

parameters.name: display_name
parameters.description: Optional final display name. Defaults to the creation workspace display name.

tools.name: app_select_workspace_style_profile
tools.description: Copy one published Style Profile markdown file into a PPT Workspace as the Selected Style Profile.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: style_profile_id
parameters.description: Published Style Profile id from app_list_style_profiles.

tools.name: app_get_workspace_style_profile
tools.description: Read the Selected Style Profile markdown text copied into a PPT Workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_clear_workspace_style_profile
tools.description: Clear the Selected Style Profile from a PPT Workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_rasterize_pptx_to_images
tools.description: Convert a PPTX file into per-slide PNG Reference Slide Images, keeping SVG diagnostics and writing rasterization-manifest.json.

parameters.name: pptx_path
parameters.description: Absolute path to the .pptx file to rasterize. The first version supports .pptx only.

parameters.name: output_dir
parameters.description: Absolute output directory where page-*.svg, page-*.png, and rasterization-manifest.json should be written.

parameters.name: target_height
parameters.description: Optional PNG target height in pixels. Defaults to 720 while preserving the slide aspect ratio.

parameters.name: overwrite
parameters.description: When true, overwrite generated output files for this run. Defaults to false.

tools.name: app_list_uploaded_sources
tools.description: List Workspace-owned Uploaded Source Material entries for a PPT Workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: include_removed
parameters.description: When true, include removed Uploaded Source Material entries.

tools.name: app_remove_uploaded_source
tools.description: Remove one Uploaded Source Material entry from the active set without physically deleting the stored file.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: uploaded_source_id
parameters.description: Stable uploaded-source id to remove from the active set.

tools.name: app_prepare_uploaded_source_analysis_workspace
tools.description: Prepare Uploaded Source Analysis directories and return draft/final analysis paths for a workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_record_uploaded_source_analysis_draft
tools.description: Record one Uploaded Source Analysis draft artifact.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: draft_type
parameters.description: Draft type: factual or visual.

parameters.name: draft_id
parameters.description: Optional draft run id.

parameters.name: draft
parameters.description: Draft JSON object.

tools.name: app_get_uploaded_source_analysis_draft
tools.description: Read one Uploaded Source Analysis draft artifact.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: draft_type
parameters.description: Draft type: factual or visual.

parameters.name: draft_id
parameters.description: Optional draft run id.

tools.name: app_get_uploaded_source_analysis_draft_fingerprint
tools.description: Read existence and file fingerprint metadata for one Uploaded Source Analysis draft artifact.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: draft_type
parameters.description: Draft type: factual or visual.

parameters.name: draft_id
parameters.description: Optional draft run id.

tools.name: app_record_uploaded_source_analysis
tools.description: Record final Uploaded Source Analysis produced by deterministic app code.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: analysis
parameters.description: Final Uploaded Source Analysis JSON object.

tools.name: app_get_uploaded_source_analysis
tools.description: Read final Uploaded Source Analysis for a workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_update_workspace_settings
tools.description: Update the PPT workspace-level setting.json and return the refreshed task workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: setting
parameters.description: Partial settings object to merge into the workspace-level setting.json.

parameters.name: persist_as_default
parameters.description: When true, also merge these settings into the global PPT defaults used by newly created workspaces.

tools.name: app_patch_workspace_settings
tools.description: Patch the PPT workspace-level setting.json and return only the normalized settings result.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: setting
parameters.description: Partial settings object to merge into the workspace-level setting.json.

parameters.name: persist_as_default
parameters.description: When true, also merge these settings into the global PPT defaults used by newly created workspaces.

tools.name: app_append_workspace_log
tools.description: Append one JSONL log entry under an existing PPT task workspace .log directory.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Workspace log channel. Supports ai-outline, ai-outline-interactions, ai-page-plan, ai-page-plan-interactions, ai-page-agent, ai-page-agent-interactions, ai-page-agent-stream, ai-research, ai-research-interactions, ai-theme, and ai-theme-interactions.

parameters.name: entry
parameters.description: JSON-serializable log entry to append.

parameters.name: payload_keys
parameters.description: Optional entry keys that may be moved to sidecar payload files when they exceed the inline payload threshold.

parameters.name: inline_payload_max_bytes
parameters.description: Optional max UTF-8 byte size before a payload key is moved to a sidecar file.

tools.name: app_get_workspace_outline
tools.description: Read and normalize outline.json for an existing PPT task workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_update_workspace_outline
tools.description: Write outline.json for an existing PPT task workspace and return the refreshed workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: outline
parameters.description: Outline artifact with title, items, source, status, and updated_at fields.

tools.name: app_update_workspace_pages
tools.description: Reorder, rename, or delete rendered workspace pages and sync the selected template manifest.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: pages
parameters.description: Ordered list of remaining pages. Each entry must include page_id and may include title.

tools.name: app_duplicate_workspace_page
tools.description: Duplicate one rendered workspace page and sync the selected template manifest plus workspace state files.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: page_id
parameters.description: Manifest slide id to duplicate.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Optional title for the duplicated slide.

tools.name: app_update_workspace_title
tools.description: Update task.json title for an existing PPT task workspace and return the refreshed workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: New workspace title.

tools.name: app_list_template_groups
tools.description: List builtin PPT template groups with static preview metadata for the app template picker.

tools.name: app_get_template_group
tools.description: Return one builtin PPT template group with layout details for the app template picker.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: Template group id, such as red-finance-v3.

tools.name: app_get_template_preview
tools.description: Return one static template preview image as a data URL.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: Template group id.

parameters.name: layout_id
parameters.description: Optional full layout id. Defaults to the group's primary preview.

tools.name: app_select_workspace_template
tools.description: Select a template group for an app workspace and fork it into workspace/template.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: template_group
parameters.description: Builtin template group id to fork into the workspace template directory.

tools.name: app_get_template_planning_context
tools.description: Return the selected workspace template catalog subset used by LLM page planning.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_get_workspace_theme_context
tools.description: Return the selected workspace template theme schema, default token, README, and current workspace theme token.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_validate_workspace_theme_token
tools.description: Validate a candidate Workspace Theme Token against the selected template theme schema.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Candidate complete Workspace Theme Token JSON object.

tools.name: app_record_workspace_theme_token
tools.description: Validate and write the Workspace Theme Token into the selected workspace template, or write the template default token as fallback.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Candidate complete Workspace Theme Token JSON object. Required unless use_default is true.

parameters.name: use_default
parameters.description: When true, write the selected template default token instead of a generated token.

tools.name: app_record_page_plan
tools.description: Validate and write page-plan.json for a workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: page_plan
parameters.description: LLM-generated page plan.

tools.name: app_get_page_plan
tools.description: Read page-plan.json for a workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_prepare_page_files
tools.description: Prepare template/slides, template/data, manifest.json, and page-progress.json from page-plan.json.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_prepare_deck_refinement_page_files
tools.description: Incrementally prepare Deck Refinement page files from page-plan.json, writing only new page TSX/data while reconciling manifest, page-progress, and rendered page references.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: new_page_ids
parameters.description: Page ids that were newly added and should be initialized from their selected blueprint.

tools.name: app_get_workspace_page_file_fingerprints
tools.description: Return SHA-256 fingerprints for a target page slide TSX and data JSON under a workspace template directory.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: slide_path
parameters.description: Template-relative slide TSX path from page-plan.json, such as ./slides/page-01.tsx.

parameters.name: data_path
parameters.description: Template-relative data JSON path from page-plan.json, such as ./data/page-01.json.

tools.name: app_get_page_progress
tools.description: Read page-progress.json for a workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_prepare_research_workspace
tools.description: Prepare workspace research directories and initialize research plan, evidence, and status artifacts.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_record_research_plan
tools.description: Write the deck-level Research Plan artifact for a workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: research_plan
parameters.description: Research Plan artifact.

tools.name: app_get_research_plan
tools.description: Read the deck-level Research Plan artifact for a workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_record_research_evidence
tools.description: Write the Research Evidence index artifact for a workspace and return a compact write summary.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: evidence
parameters.description: Research Evidence index artifact.

tools.name: app_record_research_evidence_page
tools.description: Upsert one page-level Research Evidence record into the workspace Research Evidence index and return a compact write summary.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: page_evidence
parameters.description: One page-level Research Evidence record with page_id.

tools.name: app_get_research_evidence
tools.description: Read the Research Evidence index artifact for a workspace. Large results may be returned by result_upload.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_finalize_research_visual_assets
tools.description: Copy selected raw research image assets into research/evidence/images and return canonical Visual Research Evidence records with gaps and rejected material.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: page_id
parameters.description: Page id that owns the selected visual assets.

parameters.name: visual_assets
parameters.description: Visual Research Curation Draft assets selected from local raw image material.

parameters.name: raw_image_index_paths
parameters.description: Optional raw image index paths for audit metadata lookup.

tools.name: app_record_research_curation_draft
tools.description: Write a page-level Web or Visual Research Curation Draft artifact for a workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: page_id
parameters.description: Page Generation Unit id, for example page-01.

parameters.name: draft_type
parameters.description: Draft type: web or visual.

parameters.name: draft_id
parameters.description: Optional unique draft artifact id. When omitted, the legacy page-level draft path is used.

parameters.name: draft
parameters.description: Research Curation Draft artifact.

tools.name: app_get_research_curation_draft
tools.description: Read a page-level Web or Visual Research Curation Draft artifact for a workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: page_id
parameters.description: Page Generation Unit id, for example page-01.

parameters.name: draft_type
parameters.description: Draft type: web or visual.

parameters.name: draft_id
parameters.description: Optional unique draft artifact id. When omitted, the legacy page-level draft path is used.

tools.name: app_get_research_curation_draft_fingerprint
tools.description: Return the existence and SHA-256 fingerprint for a page-level Web or Visual Research Curation Draft artifact.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: page_id
parameters.description: Page Generation Unit id, for example page-01.

parameters.name: draft_type
parameters.description: Draft type: web or visual.

parameters.name: draft_id
parameters.description: Optional unique draft artifact id. When omitted, the legacy page-level draft path is used.

tools.name: app_record_research_evidence_page_markdown
tools.description: Write the current-page Research Evidence markdown summary for a workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: page_id
parameters.description: Page Generation Unit id, for example page-01.

parameters.name: markdown
parameters.description: Markdown content to write.

tools.name: app_record_research_status
tools.description: Write the Research Collection and Research Curation status artifact for a workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Research status artifact.

tools.name: app_record_research_status_page
tools.description: Upsert one page-level Research Status record and recompute the workspace Research Status aggregate.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: page_status
parameters.description: One page-level Research Status record with page_id.

tools.name: app_get_research_status
tools.description: Read the Research Collection and Research Curation status artifact for a workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_record_page_progress
tools.description: Patch page-progress.json. When page_id is provided, patch one page entry; recovery and final_deck_render in patch update top-level recovery state.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: page_id
parameters.description: Optional page id from page-plan.json. Omit for deck-level recovery state updates.

parameters.name: patch
parameters.description: Partial page fields, plus optional top-level recovery and final_deck_render patches.

tools.name: app_render_workspace_page_preview
tools.description: Render one workspace manifest page to lightweight HTML and PNG preview for Agent review.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: page_index
parameters.description: Zero-based page index to render.

tools.name: app_get_rendered_deck_html
tools.description: Read existing rendered workspace deck HTML and screenshots, upload screenshot previews via Host Upload, and fail if any rendered artifact is missing.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_render_deck_html
tools.description: Render the selected workspace template manifest to reviewable deck HTML and return Host Upload screenshot previews.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_prepare_export_model
tools.description: Build the final export deck HTML for the workspace and convert it into a PPTX model JSON file.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_get_presentation
tools.description: Initialize or read the latest structured Presentation Document revision for manual preview and editing.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_save_presentation
tools.description: Validate and save a complete Presentation Document as a new conflict-safe revision.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: base_revision
parameters.description: Latest revision observed by the editor.

parameters.name: document
parameters.description: Complete structured Presentation Document to save.

tools.name: app_restore_presentation
tools.description: Restore the original Model0-derived Presentation Document as a new revision.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_prepare_edited_export_model
tools.description: Validate the latest saved Presentation Document and write a revision-specific PPTX model for export.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: expected_revision
parameters.description: Saved revision that must be exported.

tools.name: app_start_pptx_export_model
tools.description: Start preparing the PPTX export HTML and model in the background, writing progress to output/generate_ppt.json.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_get_pptx_export_status
tools.description: Read output/generate_ppt.json for the current PPTX export job status.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

tools.name: app_get_export_artifact_download_url
tools.description: Upload a recorded PPTX or PDF export artifact via Host Upload and return a structured download_upload reference.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: artifact_type
parameters.description: Export artifact type. Supports pptx and pdf.

tools.name: app_export_pdf
tools.description: Render the workspace deck into a share-ready PDF file.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: expected_revision
parameters.description: Optional saved Presentation Document revision to render instead of the original HTML.

tools.name: app_record_pptx_export
tools.description: Record the generated PPTX export path in the workspace artifacts.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: pptx_path
parameters.description: Absolute path to the generated PPTX file.

parameters.name: generator_result
parameters.description: Optional raw generator result to store with the export record.

tools.name: app_record_pdf_export
tools.description: Record the generated PDF export path in the workspace artifacts.

parameters.name: workspace_dir
parameters.description: Absolute path to an existing ppt-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss workspace.

parameters.name: pdf_path
parameters.description: Absolute path to the generated PDF file.

tools.name: listDiscoveredTemplateGroupSummaries
tools.description: List discovered template group summaries from builtin and optional local template roots.

parameters.name: include_builtin
parameters.description: Whether to include builtin template groups. Defaults to true.

parameters.name: local_roots
parameters.description: Optional list of absolute local template root directories.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory used by local template discovery.

tools.name: getAllDiscoveredTemplateGroups
tools.description: Return all discovered template groups with full layout details from builtin and optional local roots.

parameters.name: include_builtin
parameters.description: Whether to include builtin template groups. Defaults to true.

parameters.name: local_roots
parameters.description: Optional list of absolute local template root directories.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory used by local template discovery.

tools.name: getDiscoveredTemplateGroup
tools.description: Return one discovered template group with layouts from builtin and optional local roots.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: Template group id to look up.

parameters.name: include_builtin
parameters.description: Whether to include builtin template groups. Defaults to true.

parameters.name: local_roots
parameters.description: Optional list of absolute local template root directories.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory used by local template discovery.

tools.name: buildDeckHtmlFromManifest
tools.description: Build a deck viewer HTML and one rendered PNG image per slide from a manifest JSON file, write them to an output directory, and return the generated file paths.

parameters.name: manifest_path
parameters.description: Absolute path to a manifest JSON file.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory retained for compatibility.

parameters.name: output_dir
parameters.description: Absolute directory where the generated deck HTML and per-slide PNG images should be written.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Optional base name for generated files. Defaults to manifest.title after filename sanitization.

parameters.name: single_page
parameters.description: Whether to generate only one slide PNG image. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: 1-based page number to generate when single_page is true.

tools.name: validateDeckFromManifest
tools.description: Run static and optional rendered stability validation on a manifest deck and return structured diagnostics.

parameters.name: manifest_path
parameters.description: Absolute path to a manifest JSON file.

parameters.name: output_dir
parameters.description: Absolute output directory used for generated validation artifacts when rendered checks need to build deck HTML.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory retained for compatibility.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Optional presentation name forwarded to the validation engine.

parameters.name: single_page
parameters.description: Whether to validate only one slide from the manifest. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: 1-based page number to validate when single_page is true.

parameters.name: include_rendered_checks
parameters.description: Whether to run browser-based rendered validation. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: deck_html_path
parameters.description: Optional absolute prebuilt deck HTML path to reuse instead of rebuilding during rendered validation.

tools.name: convertDeckHtmlToPptxModel
tools.description: Convert a rendered deck HTML file into a PptxPresentationModel JSON file and return the output path.

parameters.name: html_path
parameters.description: Absolute path to the rendered deck HTML file to convert.

parameters.name: output_path
parameters.description: Absolute path where the generated PPTX model JSON file should be written.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory retained for compatibility.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Optional presentation name to store in the generated model.

parameters.name: settle_time_ms
parameters.description: Optional delay after render-ready before DOM extraction.

parameters.name: screenshots_dir
parameters.description: Optional absolute directory for screenshot fallback assets used during extraction.

tools.name: forkTemplateGroup
tools.description: Fork a builtin template group into a target local directory with TSX slides, group.json, manifest.json, catalog.json, and data assets.

parameters.name: template_group
parameters.description: Builtin template group id to fork, such as general or red-finance.

parameters.name: out_dir
parameters.description: Absolute target directory for the forked template group.

parameters.name: manifest_title
parameters.description: Optional title to write into the generated manifest.json.

parameters.name: overwrite
parameters.description: Whether to replace a non-empty output directory. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Optional absolute working directory retained for compatibility.
